questionHtml: Deduce the fission reaction when 239Pu is bombarded with a neutron to produce 133Xe and 103Zr.
markschemeHtml:
239Pu + 1n → 133Xe + 103Zr + 41n ✔

 

Accept equation with correct atomic numbers included.

Accept notation for neutrons of “n”.

Accept a correctly described equation in words.

meta.title: Deduce the fission reaction when 239Pu is bombarded with a neutron to produce 133Xe and 103Zr.
